title: Loop Mastery - Common Patterns
description: Learn essential loop patterns and techniques including accumulation, nested loops, and search patterns.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: One powerful pattern is accumulation—using a loop to build up a total. Initialize a variable to zero, then add to it each iteration!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Like counting total harvests? Start at 0 and add 1 each time?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Accumulation works for summing values, counting items, building lists—it's everywhere in programming!

objectives.description: Create an accumulation loop with total variable (initialize variable, loop, accumulate)
Accumulate values inside the loop via += or -= operators

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: The total grew with each iteration!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Accumulation is one of the most common loop patterns!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: To process a grid, use nested loops! Put one loop inside another. An outer loop for rows, inner loop for columns!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So the inner loop runs completely for each iteration of the outer loop?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! If the outer runs 3 times and the inner runs 3 times, you get 3 × 3 = 9 total iterations!

objectives.description: Create a nested loop (loop inside a loop)
Ensure proper indentation for nested loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Nested loops let me process 2D grids systematically!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect for farm plots arranged in rows and columns!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Sometimes you want to stop a loop early when you find what you're looking for. Use 'break' to exit the loop immediately!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So if I'm searching for a specific crop, I can stop once I find it?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Use an if statement inside the loop, and when the condition matches, call break!

objectives.description: Use break to exit a loop early

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Break stops the loop immediately! So efficient!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: The search pattern is fundamental to programming!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Final pattern challenge! Create a farming script that combines multiple loop patterns!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Harvest 10 wheat crops using accumulation, nested loops, and search patterns! Show me your loop mastery!

objectives.description: Harvest 10 wheat crops using multiple loop patterns

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I combined all the loop patterns into one sophisticated system!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! Loops are algorithms—step-by-step solutions to problems. Now let's combine loops with conditionals for ultimate power!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: Smart Loops - Combining Iteration and Logic
